title: Mob Solace
description: Mobs dont burn in the sun!
body:
#  ⭐️Mob Solace⭐️

This Datapack disables mobs from burning in the sun, this makes for a slightly more difficult experience without feeling too difficult. 

![Mobs not burning](https://i.imgur.com/nhXG9T1.png)







<details>
<summary>🍂Commands</summary>

Uninstall:
/function msolace:uninstall

*Changed your mind?*

Reinstall:
function msolace:reinstall

</details>

<details>
<summary>🪰Known Bugs</summary>

- Phantoms will still burn in the sun

- Mobs with a helmet no longer spawn naturally


How to spawn a mob with a helmet:

summon minecraft:zombie ~ ~ ~ {Tags:["global.ignore"]}

replace zombie with any mob that burns in the sun (Other than phantoms)

</details>
